title: CSS Environment Variables Module Level 1 — Safe Area Insets
summary: W3C specification defining env(safe-area-inset-*) environment variables that provide the distance between the viewport and the device's notch, rounded corners, or home indicator on mobile devices.
supportingClaims: The env() CSS function provides viewport-relative inset values that adapt to each device's physical display shape.
Fixed-position elements at viewport edges require safe-area padding to avoid occlusion by device hardware features.
